summary: Comprehensive testing of Kishor Hosiery Order Management System. Backend: All 33 API tests passed (100% success rate). Frontend: Core flows working - login, dashboard, order CRUD, user management, notifications. Found 3 issues: tab navigation not working via clicks, staff can access Users page via direct URL (security issue), and auth token persistence issues on direct navigation.

minor.issue: JWT key length warning - 30 bytes instead of recommended 32 bytes for SHA256

ui_bugs.issue: Bottom tab navigation (Orders, Users, Alerts) does not navigate when clicked. Clicking tabs doesn't change the screen. Direct URL navigation works.

integration_issues.issue: 401 errors appear in console when navigating directly to URLs (e.g., /users, /notifications). Pages still load but auth token may not be persisting correctly across navigations.

react_native_issues.issue: Deprecation warning: 'Image: style.resizeMode is deprecated. Please use props.resizeMode.' Appears in console logs.
Deprecation warning: 'props.pointerEvents is deprecated. Use style.pointerEvents.' Appears in console logs.

security_issues.issue: Staff users can access /users page via direct URL navigation even though the Users tab is hidden in navigation. Route should be protected with role-based access control.

action_items: CRITICAL: Add route protection for /users page - staff should get 403 or redirect when accessing directly
HIGH: Fix tab navigation - clicking bottom tabs (Orders, Users, Alerts) should navigate to respective screens
MEDIUM: Fix auth token persistence on direct URL navigation to eliminate 401 errors
LOW: Update Image components to use props.resizeMode instead of style.resizeMode
LOW: Update TouchableOpacity to use style.pointerEvents instead of props.pointerEvents
LOW: Increase JWT_SECRET length to 32+ bytes in backend/.env
critical_code_review_comments: Route Protection Missing: The Users screen hides the tab for staff users but doesn't protect the route. Add middleware or route guard in _layout.tsx to check user role and redirect staff away from /users route.
Tab Navigation Issue: The bottom tab navigation doesn't work when clicked. This might be an Expo Router configuration issue or event handling problem. Check if tabs are properly linked to routes.

Auth Token Persistence: Direct URL navigation causes 401 errors suggesting AsyncStorage token might not be loaded before API calls. Consider adding a loading state or ensuring token is loaded before rendering protected routes.
seed_data_creation: Created test orders (TEST_Automation Traders, TEST_UI Party) and test user (TEST_UI User) during testing. Backend tests create and clean up their own test data.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend APIs are fully functional and tested. Frontend core flows work but tab navigation is broken. When retesting, focus on: 1) Verifying tab navigation fix, 2) Testing staff cannot access /users route directly, 3) Confirming no 401 errors on navigation. All test data prefixed with TEST_ can be cleaned up.

backend: Auth: OTP send/verify, token validation, role-based access
Orders: CRUD operations, filters (pending/ready/partial/dispatched), search, status toggles (invoice/transport/godown/dispatch)
Users: List, create, delete, role-based access, duplicate prevention
Notifications: List, unread count, mark read, creation on order events
Dashboard: Stats calculation, role-based access to audit logs
frontend: Login: Phone input with +91 prefix, OTP verification, error handling
Dashboard: Stats display, recent orders, role badge, create order button (admin only)
Order Detail: View details, toggle invoice/transport slip, add godown entries, status updates
Create Order: Form validation, submission, navigation back
User Management: List users, add new user, role selection (admin only)
Notifications: List view, mark all read button
Staff Login: Limited access, no create order button, Users tab hidden in nav

test_execution_summary.backend_tests: 33 pytest tests executed in 2.70s - all passed
test_execution_summary.frontend_tests: Playwright automation tests covering 8 major flows
test_execution_summary.test_environment: Kubernetes preview environment with MongoDB, FastAPI backend on port 8001, Expo frontend on port 3000
